code:
import io
import string

let line_opt = io.read_line()
mut sorted = true
mut has_prev = false
mut prev = 0

match line_opt
when Some(s)
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut skipping = true
    while skipping
      if i >= n
        skipping = false
      else
        match string.byte_at(s, i)
        when Some(b)
          if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
            i = i + 1
          else
            skipping = false
          end
        when None
          skipping = false
        end
      end
    end
    if i < n
      mut sign = 1
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 45
          sign = -1
          i = i + 1
        else if b == 43
          i = i + 1
        else
          ()
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      mut value = 0
      mut reading = true
      while reading
        if i >= n
          reading = false
        else
          match string.byte_at(s, i)
          when Some(b)
            if b >= 48 and b <= 57
              value = value * 10 + (b - 48)
              i = i + 1
            else
              reading = false
            end
          when None
            reading = false
          end
        end
      end
      let num = value * sign
      if has_prev
        if num < prev
          sorted = false
        end
      end
      prev = num
      has_prev = true
    end
  end
when None
  ()
end

if sorted
  println("YES")
else
  println("NO")
end
